## Meeting Purpose

[Bi-weekly all-hands meeting to introduce new hires, review new customers and pipeline, and showcase strategy sprint artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Three new hires introduced: Ben Church (software engineer), Gianpiero Puleo (design engineer), and Pedro Steimbruch (client ops engineer)](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [Strong pipeline with high-profile logos (Udemy, Sentinel-1, Outreach, Okta) in late stages](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
  - [Strategy sprint process showing significant improvements in customer onboarding and alignment](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [New publication "The Output" launching soon, showcasing GrowthX's capabilities in content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)

## Topics

### New Hires Introduction

  - [Ben Church: Software engineer from west coast Canada, background in AirBait, focus on flow product](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Gianpiero Puleo (GP): Design engineer based in California, experience in design leadership, returning to hands-on coding and design](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Pedro Steimbruch: Client ops engineer from Brazil with 10 years of web development experience, focus on early-stage startups](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)

### New Customers and Pipeline

  - [New logos: Metronome (usage-based billing for OpenAI, Anthropic) and Diligent (board management platform)](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Late-stage deals: Udemy, Sentinel-1, Outreach, Okta, Ambien](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [Verbal agreement from Monograph (service titan for architects)](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Pipeline strength attributed to nurturing VC relationships](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)

### Strategy Sprint Artifacts

  - [Improved kickoff process with tailored discovery and deeper company context](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [New artifacts: Company context, persona understanding, writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [Calibration process using hybrid personalities to create unique voice](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
  - [Demos of Atlas and Studio platforms during listening tours, leading to upsell opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=1888.0)
  - [Identifying and addressing risks early in the process](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)
  - [Development of "protocols" for standardized responses to common situations](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### The Output Publication

  - [New GrowthX publication launching soon](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
  - [Focus on unpacking the journey to great growth ("the messy middle")](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)
  - [First episode on generative engine optimization](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [High-quality design work by Ren and RAISE agency](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)

### Platform vs. Services Discussion

  - [Platform provides transparency and empowers clients to give more meaningful feedback](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=1796.0)
  - [Enhances service value by showcasing the complexity of the process](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=1913.0)
  - [Allows for a more AI-native approach to content creation and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Launch and promote "The Output" publication](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [Continue refining strategy sprint process and artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
  - [Implement learnings from listening tours into ongoing client work](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [Develop and formalize "protocols" for common client scenarios](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
  - [Prepare for potential upsells with existing clients (e.g., Superhuman, Webstack)](https://fathom.video/share/xgpbiAfbhQgw_Xguhsky9X-ZHaEfqy-E?tab=summary&timestamp=1824.0)
